# BI-260001: Superseded bootstrap umbrella item

## Disposition

Superseded by narrower backlog items:

- `BI-260002` for the timer library view.
- `BI-260003` for the selected timer view and countdown interaction.
- `BI-260004` for persistence, responsiveness, and deployment.

## Slice

This item originally grouped the first release into one broad bootstrap slice.
It is no longer an active delivery item because its scope has been split into smaller, behavior-focused backlog items.

## Traces

- REQ-FR-260001
- REQ-OR-260001
- ADR-260001
